value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Vertex AI. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude being available on third-party cloud platforms including Google Cloud's Vertex AI, Amazon Bedrock, and Microsoft Foundry, with detailed setup and usage instructions, confirming Anthropic offers Claude on third-party platforms as a current offering.
